sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa hoih hi, Topa lian hi
A ma kiang ah a bel mite

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong phatning maw, Topa hong phat ning
Na vangliatna lamdang si, Thuuk in zai e,
Lamdang nong itna, Kabelh suangpi To Zeisu.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lei vui pan innong lam to a,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kha siangtho mit hong vaksak a
It na khut tawh hong len a,
Kei nong sap leh kong dawng ding a
Ka thu sim kong hilh ding.
